title: Video: Israel shares video claiming cluster bomb from Iranian missile fell inside empty school
summary_full: Israel alleges Iran attempted to bomb a school, sharing security footage of cluster bombs. This follows a deadly strike on an Iranian school, which Iran claims killed over 165. US media reports the Iranian incident occurred during strikes near IRGC facilities. Tensions remain high after the reported killing of Iran's Supreme Leader.
